    TenantAccessLevel

  • Uses of TenantAccessLevel in grafioschtrader.rest

    Methods in grafioschtrader.rest that return TenantAccessLevel
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected TenantAccessLevel
    TenantResource.resolveAppSpecificSwitchTargetLevel(User user, Integer homeIdTenant, Integer idTarget)
    Allows switching into a simulation tenant that is a child of the user's home tenant (in addition to the generic home/grant rules handled by the base class).
